summary: Physician specialty does not significantly impact medication history documentation due to standardized practices using objective data sources such as pharmacy records, EHRs, and caregiver inputs. These methods ensure consistent, accurate, and complete reporting across all medical specialties through shared tools and interdisciplinary collaboration.
